title: T-137 — Foundation shell prototype label index entries
prompt:
# T-137 — Foundation shell prototype label index entries

Wave: `app-shell-foundation-20260520` (00-foundation).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create the missing prototype-label index entries for the shared Foundation shell so every prototype-backed shell task can cite a stable `prototype_index_entry`, not just ad-hoc JSX line ranges.

## Files (scope)
- `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-foundation-shell.json` [create]
- `_meta/prototype-labels/master-index.json` [create-or-modify — append/merge the same labels if absent]

Do NOT edit prototype JSX files. Do NOT edit product code.

## Required labels
Create these entries, each with `label`, `file`, `lines`, `component_type`, `ui_pattern`, `module`, `translation_notes`, `shadcn_equivalent`, `known_bugs`, and `estimated_translation_time_min`:

1. `foundation_shell_tokens` → settings/shell.jsx:1-105 + technical/shell.jsx:1-74 + scanner/shell.jsx:1-66.
2. `foundation_navigation_manifest` → settings/shell.jsx:3-21 + reporting/shell.jsx:3-23 + multi-site/shell.jsx:77-124 + settings/shell.jsx:35-59.
3. `foundation_app_sidebar` → settings/shell.jsx:3-21 + reporting/shell.jsx:3-23 + multi-site/shell.jsx:77-124.
4. `foundation_app_topbar` → settings/shell.jsx:23-33 + multi-site/shell.jsx:13-69 + multi-site/shell.jsx:127-149.
5. `foundation_app_shell_layout` → settings/shell.jsx:1-105.
6. `foundation_page_header_settings_nav` → settings/shell.jsx:35-59 + settings/shell.jsx:61-69 + oee/shell.jsx PageHead cross-reference.
7. `foundation_scanner_frame` → scanner/shell.jsx:1-66 and scanner/shell.jsx:9-66.
8. `foundation_shell_browser_parity_gate` → settings/shell.jsx:1-105 + scanner/shell.jsx:1-66 + reporting/shell.jsx:3-23 + multi-site/shell.jsx:77-149.
9. `foundation_module_route_contract` → settings/shell.jsx:3-21 + reporting/shell.jsx:3-23 + multi-site/shell.jsx:77-124, covering route parity for every AppSidebar item.

## Acceptance criteria
1. `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-foundation-shell.json` parses as JSON array and contains exactly the nine required `foundation_*` labels.
2. `_meta/prototype-labels/master-index.json` contains the same eight labels, with `module="foundation"` and file paths under `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/`.
3. Every cited file exists and every line range is within the file length; write a small Python validation snippet in closeout output showing PASS.
4. No prototype JSX files or product code are modified.
5. `python3 _meta/atomic-tasks/00-foundation/waves/app-shell-foundation-20260520/validate_wave.py` still passes after this task's metadata changes.

## Test strategy
- RED: write/run a Python one-liner that fails because `prototype-index-foundation-shell.json` is missing or labels are absent.
- Implement the index file and master-index merge.
- Run the Python validation snippet for label presence + range bounds.
- Run `python3 _meta/atomic-tasks/00-foundation/waves/app-shell-foundation-20260520/validate_wave.py`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not edit `prototypes/design/**`.
- Do not invent line ranges without checking file length.
- Do not remove or rewrite existing master-index entries; append/merge only missing labels.
- Do not use vague labels; every shell task must have a stable `foundation_*` label.

pipeline_inputs.description: Create stable foundation shell prototype-label index entries consumed by all prototype-backed AppShell tasks, including module-route contract labeling.

master-index.json contains the same eight labels with module=foundation
Every cited prototype file exists and every line range is within current file length
No prototype JSX files or product code modified
test_strategy: Python RED check for missing foundation labels
Python validation for label presence and line-range bounds
risk_red_lines: Do not delete or rewrite existing master-index entries
